output.level_rationale: Title is 'Analyst' with no JD body, responsibilities, or context. At face value, 'Analyst' typically signals L3 or entry-level scope. No years required, reporting line, team size, or seniority signals in the provided text. Company stage is unknown.
output.summary: JD is essentially a title and location with no substantive role description, responsibilities, scope, or seniority signals. 'GTM Strategy & Operations Analyst' at Datadog aligns with the candidate's target family (GTM / Sales Strategy), but the title-only format and 'Analyst' designation suggest junior scope, creating high mismatch risk with an eight-year senior leader. Request the full job description before evaluating fit.
uncertainties: No JD body provided; only title, location, and boilerplate company careers-page content
